Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ActionableListDatasetColumn

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ActionableListDatasetColumn
public class ActionableListDatasetColumn extends Object

Java class for ActionableListDatasetColumn complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ActionableListDatasetColumn">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="dataDomain" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DatasetColumnDataType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dataType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DatatableDataType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="displayOrder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isDefault" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="objectName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceColumnApiName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceFieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
